---
description: Run the reflector to update memory after the current session
agent: reflector
---

Invoke @reflector with the session summary.

Include in your summary:
- Feature/task completed
- What worked well
- What caused rework (self-heal events)
- TDD Phase 2 first-attempt result (green/red)
- Any heuristic overrides

@reflector: Update all memory tiers based on this session.
